title: SkyCraft 2
description: a pony kitchen sink modpack focused on exploration and building with ponies
body:
a pony focused continedt world gen based exploration modpack with magic and technology mods with the goal of making cool looking bases

the modpack includes a lot of mods that add blocks with some technology mods to help oranize and collect them

it includes unicopia, minelp and cpm for pony features and skins

terralith and techtonic provide a vanilla like terrain generation

the modpack also has seasons set to sync the nothern hemosphere so I recommend starting it during spring or summer unless you like a chalange to get food

Credits for extenal files:
```
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
```
